cover: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Apex API v67 User Mode Default'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Apex API v67: User Mode Is the Default'. Subtitle 'SOQL, DML, Database methods, sharing defaults, and enterprise breakpoints'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'SOQL now respects CRUD/FLS with lock icon', 'DML fails on hidden fields with shield icon', 'Classes default with sharing with record grid icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'OLD ASSUMPTION' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'V67 FIX' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'List<Account> a = [SELECT Id, AnnualRevenue FROM Account]; update a;', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'List<Account> a = [SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WITH USER_MODE]; Database.update(a, AccessLevel.USER_MODE);'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'explicit access mode', 'persona tests', 'privileged service boundary'. Footer bar: 'apex api v67 user mode default soql security 2026'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Apex v67 Default Security Shift'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Apex API v67: Defaults Changed'. Subtitle 'System assumptions now fail under user-mode SOQL and DML'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Field-level security blocks hidden fields with lock icon', 'Sharing filters records with record grid icon', 'Restriction rules apply with funnel icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'PRE-V67 ASSUMPTION' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'V67 CONTRACT' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'public class CaseSelector { public static List<Case> openCases(){ return [SELECT Id, Subject, Internal_Notes__c FROM Case WHERE Status != \\'Closed\\']; }}', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'with sharing class CaseSelector { public static List<Case> openCases(){ return [SELECT Id, Subject FROM Case WHERE Status != \\'Closed\\' WITH USER_MODE]; }}'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'declare sharing', 'select only needed fields', 'test as real personas'. Footer bar: 'User mode is a contract, not a syntax update'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Enterprise v67 Selector Refactor'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'From Fat Selectors to Persona Selectors'. Subtitle 'Manufacturing revenue org: Sales, Finance, Agentforce, Back Office'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '70-field selector failed with FLS lock icon', 'Agentforce action needed safe renewal fields with robot icon', 'Batch jobs needed explicit system boundary with gear icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'FAT SELECTOR' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'PERSONA SELECTORS' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id, Name, Gross_Margin__c, Legal_Exception_Reason__c FROM Opportunity', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'SELECT Id, Name, StageName, Renewal_Risk__c FROM Opportunity WITH USER_MODE'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Sales selector', 'Finance selector', 'Back office boundary'. Footer bar: 'One selector per security contract'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
